/home/tcspc/gcc-arm-10.3-2021.07-x86_64-aarch64-none-linux-gnu/bin/aarch64-none-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 -fpermissive -fno-aggressive-loop-optimizations  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -rdynamic CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/apd_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/apd_voltage_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/cooler_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/cooler_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/depth_process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/preprocess_uart_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/preprocess_uart_slave.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/serial_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/task_reg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/tof_process.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/udp_send.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GMAPD_UART.dir/task_module/cpp/util.cpp.o -o ../binOutput/GMAPD_UART   -L/home/tcspc/code/GMAPD_UART/lib  -L/home/tcspc/code/GMAPD_UART/lib/platform  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tcspc/code/GMAPD_UART/lib:/home/tcspc/code/GMAPD_UART/lib/platform -ldl -lmodules -lperiphery -lrockchip_mpp -lrockit -ldrm -lasound -lcli -lcjson -lpthread
